body_txt: Many works have the Holy Hand Grenade : a purifying, holy blast of light and goodness which eradicates evil in sight, turning it into a dusty pile of ash. However, what happens if it gets reversed? The Unholy Nuke tends to be a power fit for a Big Bad : a devastating magic/technique/ritual fueled by unholy power, often the Evil Counterpart to a technique used by the good guys. Usually it involves Black Magic and darkness, but other elements can play a role as well. Bonus points if it's Powered by a Forsaken Child . It may be a Dangerous Forbidden Technique . Sometimes an Evil Knockoff will use this as a dark mirror of one of the hero's own powers. In Video Games , expect to see it used by the Final Boss . When handling the powers of darkness, don't forget that Evil Is Not a Toy . See also Light Is Not Good , Casting a Shadow , Person of Mass Destruction , and World-Wrecking Wave . May or not be part of a Yin-Yang Bomb . Contrast Holy Hand Grenade . See also Fantastic Nuke , where the emphasis is on the scale of the damage done regardless of whether the spell is specifically "unholy" or not.
